experts.name: Seth Godin
experts.framework: Permission marketing, remarkable products, tribes. Asks: Is this remarkable enough that someone would tell a friend? Does it earn attention rather than steal it?
key_questions: Does this build trust or extract it?
Is this for everyone or for someone specific?
experts.values: Authenticity, generosity, specificity over mass appeal

experts.name: Alex Hormozi
experts.framework: Grand Slam Offers, value equation. Asks: Is the value proposition irresistible? Does the offer stack make the price feel like a steal?
key_questions: Does the price anchor make sense?
experts.values: Clear value, strong guarantees, irresistible offers

experts.name: Gary Vaynerchuk
experts.framework: Jab jab jab right hook. Document don't create. Asks: Is this authentic? Would a real person post this or does it feel corporate?
key_questions: Is this providing value before asking?

experts.name: David Ogilvy
experts.framework: Research-driven advertising, long-form copy that sells. Asks: Is the headline doing its job? Does the copy make you want to read the next line?
key_questions: Does the headline promise a benefit?
Is there a clear call to action?
Would this work as a direct mail piece?

experts.name: Brian Dean
experts.framework: Skyscraper technique, content that ranks. Asks: Is this the best piece of content on this topic? Would someone link to this?
key_questions: Is this 10x better than what ranks?
experts.values: Data-driven, quality over quantity, link-worthy content

experts.name: Ann Handley
experts.framework: Everybody writes. Reader-first content. Asks: Is every sentence earning the next? Would you read this if you didn't have to?
key_questions: Is this written for a reader or for SEO?
Does every paragraph earn its place?

experts.name: Russell Brunson
experts.framework: DotCom Secrets, funnel hacking. Asks: Does this guide the visitor through a clear journey? Is there a value ladder?
key_questions: Does each step lead naturally to the next?
experts.values: Story-driven selling, clear funnels, tested frameworks

experts.name: Steve Krug
experts.framework: Don't Make Me Think. Asks: Can a first-time visitor figure this out in 3 seconds? Is there anything that makes them think?
key_questions: Can you tell what this page is about instantly?

experts.name: Donald Miller
experts.framework: StoryBrand. The customer is the hero, you are the guide. Asks: Is the customer the center of this story?
key_questions: Is the brand positioned as guide, not hero?
experts.values: Clarity, story structure, customer as hero

experts.name: Ben Settle
experts.framework: Daily email selling. Personality-driven, entertainment-first. Asks: Would someone actually look forward to reading this email?
key_questions: Is the CTA natural, not forced?

experts.name: MrBeast
experts.framework: First 3 seconds hook, retention curves, thumbnail testing. Asks: Would someone click this? Would they watch past 10 seconds?
key_questions: Does the hook grab in 3 seconds?

experts.name: Brand Voice Insider
experts.framework: Brand voice alignment, community fit, capability accuracy. Asks: Does this match who [your brand] actually is? Would our community resonate?
key_questions: Does this match our brand voice?
Is this accurate to our capabilities?
